The **men's 50 metre freestyle** competition of the [swimming events](/wiki/Swimming_at_the_2011_World_Aquatics_Championships "Swimming at the 2011 World Aquatics Championships") at the [2011 World Aquatics Championships](/wiki/2011_World_Aquatics_Championships "2011 World Aquatics Championships") was held on July 29 with the heats and the semifinals and July 30 with the final.

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=Swimming_at_the_2011_World_Aquatics_Championships_%E2%80%93_Men%27s_50_metre_freestyle&action=edit&section=1 "Edit section: Records")]
